checks: API-key tenant grants still resolve principals and enforce tenant access before route handlers run.
Cloudflare Access JWTs validate signature, time claims, optional audience, issuer, and tenant policy grants.
Company and organization profile fields are not consulted for authorization.
Group ACL reads require the authenticated principal or one of its tenant-scoped groups.
Resource share updates require resource ownership and group owner/admin role for group targets.
Playwright E2E uses a deterministic mock API server instead of depending on live D1 or external login providers.
residual_risk: Cloudflare Access tenant policy must be configured carefully in production; absent policy defaults only to the default tenant.
Backfilled knowledge docs without owner_principal remain share-manageable for compatibility until ownership is populated.
Shared API keys still collapse ownership to the shared principal by design.
